name: colly
title: colly
summary: Elegant Scraper and Crawler Framework for Golang (program)
description:
Elegant Scraper and Crawler Framework for Golang (program)
This package contains a Colly Lightning Fast and Elegant Scraping Framework
for Gophers.  Colly provides a clean interface to write any kind of
crawler/scraper/spider.
.
With Colly you can easily extract structured data from websites, which
can be used for a wide range of applications, like data mining, data
processing or archiving.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use colly because Elegant Scraper and Crawler Framework for Golang (program).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use colly as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `colly [options] [args]` as documented upstream for colly.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair colly with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `colly --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
